author: 栗子仁儿
description: Preview DXF/DWG CAD drawings directly in Obsidian (based on mlightcad/cad-viewer). Supports both DXF and DWG formats with full rendering. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: 栗子仁儿
manifest.description: Preview and render DXF / DWG CAD drawings directly inside your notes (based on mlightcad/cad-viewer with Three.js WebGL). Supports both formats with full rendering.
manifest.name: CAD Viewer

name: CAD Viewer

releases.author: liamzy2021
releases.description:
V1.0.2 — Core release:

In-note DXF/DWG preview — double-click a .dxf / .dwg file and it opens inside the note, not in AutoCAD / your OS default app
Self-contained 3-file release — the ~14 MB of parser workers (including the LibreDWG WASM) are inlined into main.js, so a plain community release (manifest.json + main.js + styles.css) works with zero extra downloads
Fast parse — larger worker chunk size reduces round-trips for big DWG files
releases.name: Obsidian-CAD-DWG-DXF-viewer

releases.author: liamzy2021
releases.description:
**V1.0.0** — Core release:
- **In-note DXF/DWG preview** — double-click a `.dxf` / `.dwg` file and it opens inside the note, not in AutoCAD / your OS default app
- **Self-contained 3-file release** — the ~14 MB of parser workers (including the LibreDWG WASM) are inlined into `main.js`, so a plain community release (`manifest.json` + `main.js` + `styles.css`) works with zero extra downloads
- **Fast parse** — larger worker chunk size reduces round-trips for big DWG files
releases.name: Obsidian-CAD-DWG-DXF-viewer
